titleStmt.title: SII 34.276: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 276. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the wall of the south verandah of the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Records a peace settlement entered between Iṉbaṉ Āriyachakravarti and Sūriyaṉ, and others on one side and Aḍiyārkkunallāṉ Aṅgarāyaṉ and Kuppaṉ on the other. There was a long-standing feud between the two groups as Teṟkil-araiyaṉ killed Irāhuttaṉ, the younger brother of Aṅgarāyaṉ. By the present settlement both the groups swore to each other to stand united in all circumstances and help each other in adverse circumstances.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vīrapāṇṭiyatEvaṟku cellā niṉṟa tātu varuṣam puraṭ Irācarāca vaḷanāṭṭu valla nāṭṭu
Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṅkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkōyilil tānattāṟkum Ūrāṟkum
makkaḷu marumakkaḷum mutta
cōḻanāṭāḻvāṉ yum cūriyaṉum
kaḷil Icainta pakai Oruṅka cantirātittavaraikku Innāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyanār tirukkōyil kallilum cem
pilum veṭṭikkuṭuttapaṭi muṉṉāḷ Aṅkarāyan tampi Irākuttaṉai ciṅkamaṅkalattu
k teṟkkil Araiyaṉ marumakkaḷ Eṉṟu Iṉpaṉ Āriyaccakkiṟavatti
ṉummenṟu Eytum ppaṭṭa pakaikku Aṭiyāṟku nallāṉ Aṅkarāyaṉum kuppāṉum makkaḷum marumakkaḷum
Irākuttaṉ paṭṭapāṭṭukkut teṟkilaraiyaṉai kēṭṭukkoḷḷuma toḻiya Iṉpaṉ Āriyaccakkiṟavattiyaiyum cūriyaṉaiyum makkaḷ
marumakkaḷaiyum Inta paḻi Eṉṟu collakkaṭavōm mallavākavum Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatalla venṟu tirumalaiyillē
ṇum makkaḷumarumakkaḷu cellum Aḷavil Iṉpaṉ Āriyaccakkiṟavattiyum cūriyaṉum makkaḷ marumakkaḷum teṟkil
ceyyakkaṭavata
llavākavum teṟkil Araiyaṉ mēle Irākuttaṉ paṭṭapāṭu Aṅkarāyaṉum kuppāṉum makkaḷ maru makkaḷum ṇaiyāka
I cūriyaṉum makkaḷ marumakkaḷum kūṭac cellakkaṭavōmākavum Aṅkarāyan ku
ppāṉ Ivarkaḷ makkaḷ marumakkaḷukku vēṟu viṉaiyuṇṭāṉāl Ivarkaḷ kaiyyilē pakaittīṭṭu vāṅka Inpan Āriyacca
kkaṟavattiyum cūriyaṉum marumakkaḷ marumakkaḷum cellak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Inpan Āriyacakkaravatti
kkaḷ marumakkaḷum kac cellak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Inta Aṟutippaṭiyilē Oruvarkku vanta pi
mai tīṉmaiyum Inta Aṉaivarum Onṟupaṭṭu cantirātittavaraikku naṭattip pōtakka ṭavōmāka
yil tappiṉārruṇṭākil Aṭiyāṟku nallāṉ Aṅkarāyaṉum ma kkaḷum marumakkaḷum
kāṇiyāṉ n vayakkalum Uṭpaṭṭa nilam Arumāvuñ
Digital edition of SII 34.276 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
